[[af:Aardhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-iū]][[de:Erde-Hahn]][[hak:Kí-yû]][[ja:己酉]][[ko:기유]][[vi:Kỷ Dậu]][[za:Geijyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-iú]][[zh-yue:己酉]][[zh:己酉]]

'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by [[Yang Earth Monkey]] and followed by [[Yang Metal Dog]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], resulting in a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]] (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

==Years of Yin Earth Rooster==
Years in the [[Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
*[[49]]
*[[109]]
*[[169]]
*[[229]]
*[[289]]
*[[349]]
*[[409]]
*[[469]]
*[[529]]
*[[589]]
*[[649]]
*[[709]]
*[[769]]
*[[829]]
*[[889]]
*[[949]]
|
*[[1009]]
*[[1069]]
*[[1129]]
*[[1189]]
*[[1249]]
*[[1309]]
*[[1369]]
*[[1429]]
*[[1489]]
*[[1549]]
*[[1609]]
*[[1669]]
*[[1729]]
*[[1789]]
*[[1849]]
*[[1909]]
*[[1969]]
|
*[[2029]]
*[[2089]]
*2149
*[[2209]]
*2269
*2329
*2389
*2449
*[[2509]]
*[[2569]]
*[[2629]]
*[[2689]]
*[[2749]]
*[[2809]]
*[[2869]]
*2929
*2989
|}
=== Events ===
* The [[Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The [[Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609]] (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is [[Mizunoe (壬)]] or [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or the [[Solar term]] (from [[Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Days of Yin Earth Rooster==
=== Selection ===
=== 2 ===
== See Also ==
{{wikidata link|Q905305}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
